summary: Full end-to-end testing of Daily Checks feature completed. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests pass covering /items (15 items, auth-gated), POST + GET roundtrip, upsert-not-duplicate behavior, history, completion grid, and admin-only gating on history+completion. Frontend (mobile 390x844): login as super admin works, /admin/daily-checks loads, 15 items render, All Pass toggles to 15/15, Clear toggles to 0/15, save succeeds with 'Saved! 3/15 checks passed' message, reload+reselect persists saved state, History tab shows 3 entries (including the 15/15 entry created by backend test + upsert worked), Overview tab renders colored grid cells (green/orange/red) across all 5 active locations, sidebar 'Daily Checks' link visible on dashboard, and no horizontal overflow on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/daily_checks.py: MongoDB sync pymongo calls (find_one/update_one/insert_one/find) used inside async FastAPI handlers — these block the event loop under load. If daily_checks_collection is motor/async, fine; otherwise should be awaited or wrapped. Confirm db.py driver type.

routes/daily_checks.py:71-80: GET /api/admin/daily-checks with no `date` param silently returns None instead of returning all entries for that location (caller might expect a list). Consider returning [] or making `date` required with 422.
routes/daily_checks.py:61-62: `existing['id']` is used to $set update, but if legacy rows exist without `id` field, update silently fails. Should ensure all seeds/rows have `id` or update by _id.

admin-daily-checks/index.jsx:45-47: useEffect deps are [selectedLocation, entryDate] — when user types in a field after a date change, loadExisting may overwrite user state if the API response races (same pattern as Daily Sales RCA in iteration_19). No saving-guard. Recommend abort-controller or stale-response check.

admin-daily-checks/index.jsx:100: fetchHistory only re-runs when activeTab changes, not when selectedLocation changes — switching location while on History tab keeps stale data. Add selectedLocation to dependency array.
admin-daily-checks/index.jsx:3: `Download` icon imported from lucide-react but never used. Also `XLSX` imported but never used — dead imports inflate bundle.

admin-daily-checks/index.jsx:58,72,101,107: try/catch with empty catch blocks swallow errors silently — user sees no feedback when history/grid/items fail to load. Add error toast or inline error state.
No DB unique index on (location_id, date) for daily_checks_collection — race condition could produce duplicates under concurrent submits despite upsert logic.
seed_data_creation: Backend test left 1 entry at location 'Timperley, Altrincham' on date 2026-02-11 (all 15 items true, note 'TEST_updated'). Frontend test left 1 entry for same location on today's date (2026-05-02) with 3/15 passed + note 'Playwright TEST note'. Both can be manually cleaned via mongo if desired; no DELETE endpoint exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Checks backend (routes/daily_checks.py) and frontend (pages/admin-daily-checks/index.jsx) are fully working and integrated. Upsert verified — same (location_id,date) returns same id. Admin-only gating verified on /history and /completion (401/403 without auth). Sidebar link, dashboard tile, route all wired correctly. No blocking issues; code review comments are non-blocking polish items.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — feature works as designed.
